source:
#Imports
import json

from pyspark.sql.functions import hash
from pyspark.sql import functions as fn
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, concat, lit, to_timestamp,current_timestamp,date_format
from pyspark.sql.functions import sha2, concat_ws

from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, IntegerType, BooleanType,DateType, DoubleType,TimestampType

from py4j.protocol import Py4JJavaError

import com.microsoft.spark.sqlanalytics
from com.microsoft.spark.sqlanalytics.Constants import Constants

#Get Parameter from controldb
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
lake_db_name = "gold"
db_notebookname= "fact_fuel_consumption_gold"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
#print(linkedServiceProperties)
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)

db_query ="SELECT A.*,B.NotebookParameterId,B.ParameterType,B.Value  FROM [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK] A LEFT JOIN [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK_PARAMETER] B ON A.NotebookId = B.NotebookId"

df = spark.read.format("jdbc") \
    .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
    .option("query", db_query) \
    .option("accessToken", access_token) \
    .option("encrypt", "true") \
    .option("databaseName", db_name) \
    .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
    .load()

df2 = df.where(df.NotebookPath==db_notebookname)
#display(df2)

#Destination DataLake Storage Details
destination_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]["Value"]
destination_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_container').collect()[0]["Value"]
destination_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_path').collect()[0]["Value"]

#Get Current Date
Date_Collection = spark.sql("select current_timestamp() AS Current,(current_timestamp() + interval '-1' second) AS EndDate").collect()
Gold_LoadDate = Date_Collection[0]['Current']
Gold_UpdateEndDate = Date_Collection[0]['EndDate']

#Synapse Dedicated Server detials
SynapseDedicatedServer = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]['SynapseDedicatedServer'] 
TempFolder = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]['TempFolder']
SynapseDedicatedDatabase = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]['SynapseDedicatedDatabase']
# Table: FactFuelConsumption: START

#UTILS: Set table name

#drop_tablename="fact_fuel_consumption"

#UTILS: Drop table

#spark.sql(f"""DROP TABLE IF EXISTS {lake_db_name}.{drop_tablename}""")
#raw_output_path = f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{drop_tablename}"
#mssparkutils.fs.rm(raw_output_path,recurse=True)

#Set table name
db_tablename="fact_fuel_consumption"
tablename="FactFuelConsumption"

#Create Gold Table
spark.sql(f"""CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {lake_db_name};""")
spark.sql(f"""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename}
(
	FactFuelConsumptionKey STRING,
	DimMonthStartDateKey INT,
	DimSiteKey STRING,
	DimUsageCategoryKey STRING,
	DimEmissionScopeKey STRING,
	DieselTransportationConsumptionVolumeLitre DECIMAL(20,6),
	DieselStationaryConsumptionVolumeLitre DECIMAL(20,6),
	PetrolTransportationConsumptionVolumeLitre DECIMAL(20,6),
	PetrolStationaryConsumptionVolumeLitre DECIMAL(20,6),
	DieselTransportationEmissionsTCO2e DECIMAL(20,6),
	DieselStationaryEmissionsTCO2e DECIMAL(20,6),
	PetrolTransportationEmissionsTCO2e DECIMAL(20,6),
	PetrolStationaryEmissionsTCO2e DECIMAL(20,6),
	CDCLoadDate TIMESTAMP,
	CDCStartDate TIMESTAMP,
	CDCEndDate TIMESTAMP,
	CDCOps INT,
	CDCCurrentFlag BOOLEAN,
	HashDiff STRING
)
USING delta
LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename}'

# Collect emission factors from reference_data
df_emission_factors = spark.sql(f"""
                        SELECT  
                            ref.Code AS Code,
                            ref.NumericValue AS NumericValue
                        FROM silver.reference_data ref
                        WHERE ref.CDCCurrentFlag = 1 AND Dataset = 'EmissionFactor'
                    """)

emission_factor_stationary_petrol = df_emission_factors.where(df_emission_factors.Code=='EF2').collect()[0]["NumericValue"]
emission_factor_stationary_diesel = df_emission_factors.where(df_emission_factors.Code=='EF3').collect()[0]["NumericValue"]
emission_factor_transportation_petrol = df_emission_factors.where(df_emission_factors.Code=='EF5').collect()[0]["NumericValue"]
emission_factor_transportation_diesel = df_emission_factors.where(df_emission_factors.Code=='EF6').collect()[0]["NumericValue"]
#print(emission_factor_stationary_petrol)
#print(emission_factor_stationary_diesel)
#print(emission_factor_transportation_petrol)
#print(emission_factor_transportation_diesel)

# Get & combine records
source_sql_df = spark.sql(f"""  
                        SELECT
                            DimMonthStartDateKey,
                            DimSiteKey,
                            DimUsageCategoryKey,
                            DimEmissionScopeKey,
                            DieselTransportationConsumptionVolumeLitre, 
                            DieselStationaryConsumptionVolumeLitre, 
                            PetrolTransportationConsumptionVolumeLitre, 
                            PetrolStationaryConsumptionVolumeLitre,
                            ((DieselTransportationConsumptionVolumeLitre / 1000) * ({emission_factor_transportation_diesel} * 38.6 / 1000)) AS DieselTransportationEmissionsTCO2e,
                            ((DieselStationaryConsumptionVolumeLitre / 1000) * ({emission_factor_stationary_diesel} * 38.6 / 1000))  AS DieselStationaryEmissionsTCO2e,
                            ((PetrolTransportationConsumptionVolumeLitre / 1000) * ({emission_factor_transportation_petrol} * 34.2 / 1000)) AS PetrolTransportationEmissionsTCO2e,
                            ((PetrolStationaryConsumptionVolumeLitre / 1000) * ({emission_factor_stationary_petrol} * 34.2 / 1000))  AS PetrolStationaryEmissionsTCO2e

                        FROM
                        (SELECT
                            CONCAT(CAST(CAST(d.DateId / 100 AS INT) AS VARCHAR(6)), '01') AS DimMonthStartDateKey,
                            s.DimSiteKey AS DimSiteKey,
                            u.DimUsageCategoryKey AS DimUsageCategoryKey,
                            e.DimEmissionScopeKey AS DimEmissionScopeKey,
                            SUM(CASE WHEN p.StandardisedProduct = 'Diesel' AND p.UsageCategory = 'Transportation' THEN p.Quantity ELSE 0 END) AS DieselTransportationConsumptionVolumeLitre, 
                            SUM(CASE WHEN p.StandardisedProduct = 'Diesel' AND p.UsageCategory = 'Stationary' THEN p.Quantity ELSE 0 END) AS DieselStationaryConsumptionVolumeLitre, 
                            SUM(CASE WHEN p.StandardisedProduct = 'Unleaded Petrol' AND p.UsageCategory = 'Transportation' THEN p.Quantity ELSE 0 END) AS PetrolTransportationConsumptionVolumeLitre, 
                            SUM(CASE WHEN p.StandardisedProduct = 'Unleaded Petrol' AND p.UsageCategory = 'Stationary' THEN p.Quantity ELSE 0 END) AS PetrolStationaryConsumptionVolumeLitre
                        FROM
                        (SELECT 
                            'Scope 1' AS EmissionScope,
                            TransactionEffectiveDate AS TransactionEffectiveDate,
                            CASE WHEN SiteCode IS NULL THEN 'UNK' ELSE SiteCode END AS SiteCode,
                            StandardisedProduct AS StandardisedProduct,
                            SUM(Quantity) AS Quantity,
                            UsageCategory AS UsageCategory

                        FROM silver.fuel_transactions 

                        WHERE CDCCurrentFlag = 1

                        GROUP BY
                            TransactionEffectiveDate,
                            SiteCode,
                            StandardisedProduct,
                            UsageCategory
                        ) p

                        JOIN gold.dim_site s ON s.SiteCode = p.SiteCode
                        JOIN dimtables_gold.dimdate d ON d.Date = p.TransactionEffectiveDate
                        JOIN gold.dim_usage_category u ON u.UsageCategoryName = p.UsageCategory
                        JOIN gold.dim_emission_scope e ON e.EmissionScopeDescription = p.EmissionScope
                        
                        GROUP BY 
                            DimMonthStartDateKey,
                            DimSiteKey,
                            DimUsageCategoryKey,
                            DimEmissionScopeKey)
                    """)
#display(source_sql_df)

# Convert columns to STRING before creating HashDiff
source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CleanDieselTransportationConsumptionVolumeLitre", col("DieselTransportationConsumptionVolumeLitre").cast("string"))
source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CleanDieselStationaryConsumptionVolumeLitre", col("DieselStationaryConsumptionVolumeLitre").cast("string"))
source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CleanPetrolTransportationConsumptionVolumeLitre", col("PetrolTransportationConsumptionVolumeLitre").cast("string"))
source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CleanPetrolStationaryConsumptionVolumeLitre", col("PetrolStationaryConsumptionVolumeLitre").cast("string"))
source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CleanDieselTransportationEmissionsTCO2e", col("DieselTransportationEmissionsTCO2e").cast("string"))
source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CleanDieselStationaryEmissionsTCO2e", col("DieselStationaryEmissionsTCO2e").cast("string"))
source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CleanPetrolTransportationEmissionsTCO2e", col("PetrolTransportationEmissionsTCO2e").cast("string"))
source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CleanPetrolStationaryEmissionsTCO2e", col("PetrolStationaryEmissionsTCO2e").cast("string"))


source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("FactFuelConsumptionKey", sha2(concat_ws("||", "DimSiteKey", "DimMonthStartDateKey", "DimUsageCategoryKey", "DimEmissionScopeKey"), 256))
source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("HashDiff", sha2(concat_ws("||", "CleanDieselTransportationConsumptionVolumeLitre", "CleanDieselStationaryConsumptionVolumeLitre", "CleanPetrolTransportationConsumptionVolumeLitre", "CleanPetrolStationaryConsumptionVolumeLitre", "CleanDieselTransportationEmissionsTCO2e", "CleanDieselStationaryEmissionsTCO2e", "CleanPetrolTransportationEmissionsTCO2e", "CleanPetrolStationaryEmissionsTCO2e"), 256))

# Add CDC columns
source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CDCLoadDate", to_timestamp(lit(Gold_LoadDate),'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CDCStartDate", to_timestamp(lit(Gold_LoadDate), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CDCEndDate", to_timestamp(lit("9999-12-31 23:59:59"), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CDCCurrentFlag", lit(1))
source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CDCOps", lit(1))

#display(source_sql_df)

# Row count parameters
Gold_Insert_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Gold_Update_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Gold_Delete_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 0 """).collect()[0][0]
# Create a temporary view of the dataframe
source_sql_df.createOrReplaceTempView("temp_view")

# SCD2 logic
# Use the merge operation to update the target table
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_view s
    ON t.FactFuelConsumptionKey = s.FactFuelConsumptionKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag == true
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDCEndDate = '{Gold_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDCCurrentFlag = false,
                 t.CDCOps = s.CDCOps + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
      INSERT (FactFuelConsumptionKey, DimSiteKey, DimMonthStartDateKey, DimUsageCategoryKey, DimEmissionScopeKey, DieselTransportationConsumptionVolumeLitre, DieselStationaryConsumptionVolumeLitre, PetrolTransportationConsumptionVolumeLitre, PetrolStationaryConsumptionVolumeLitre, DieselTransportationEmissionsTCO2e, DieselStationaryEmissionsTCO2e, PetrolTransportationEmissionsTCO2e, PetrolStationaryEmissionsTCO2e, CDCLoadDate, CDCStartDate, CDCEndDate, CDCOps, CDCCurrentFlag, HashDiff)
      VALUES (s.FactFuelConsumptionKey, s.DimSiteKey, s.DimMonthStartDateKey, s.DimUsageCategoryKey, s.DimEmissionScopeKey, s.DieselTransportationConsumptionVolumeLitre, s.DieselStationaryConsumptionVolumeLitre, s.PetrolTransportationConsumptionVolumeLitre, s.PetrolStationaryConsumptionVolumeLitre, s.DieselTransportationEmissionsTCO2e, s.DieselStationaryEmissionsTCO2e, s.PetrolTransportationEmissionsTCO2e, s.PetrolStationaryEmissionsTCO2e, s.CDCLoadDate, s.CDCStartDate, s.CDCEndDate, s.CDCOps, s.CDCCurrentFlag, s.HashDiff)
""")

# Use the merge operation to Insert updated record 
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_view s
    ON t.FactFuelConsumptionKey = s.FactFuelConsumptionKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag == true
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDCEndDate = '{Gold_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDCCurrentFlag = false,
                 t.CDCOps = s.CDCOps + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
      INSERT (FactFuelConsumptionKey, DimSiteKey, DimMonthStartDateKey, DimUsageCategoryKey, DimEmissionScopeKey, DieselTransportationConsumptionVolumeLitre, DieselStationaryConsumptionVolumeLitre, PetrolTransportationConsumptionVolumeLitre, PetrolStationaryConsumptionVolumeLitre, DieselTransportationEmissionsTCO2e, DieselStationaryEmissionsTCO2e, PetrolTransportationEmissionsTCO2e, PetrolStationaryEmissionsTCO2e, CDCLoadDate, CDCStartDate, CDCEndDate, CDCOps, CDCCurrentFlag, HashDiff)
      VALUES (s.FactFuelConsumptionKey, s.DimSiteKey, s.DimMonthStartDateKey, s.DimUsageCategoryKey, s.DimEmissionScopeKey, s.DieselTransportationConsumptionVolumeLitre, s.DieselStationaryConsumptionVolumeLitre, s.PetrolTransportationConsumptionVolumeLitre, s.PetrolStationaryConsumptionVolumeLitre, s.DieselTransportationEmissionsTCO2e, s.DieselStationaryEmissionsTCO2e, s.PetrolTransportationEmissionsTCO2e, s.PetrolStationaryEmissionsTCO2e, s.CDCLoadDate, s.CDCStartDate, s.CDCEndDate, s.CDCOps, s.CDCCurrentFlag, s.HashDiff)

#Row count parameters
Gold_Insert_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Gold_Update_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Gold_Delete_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 0 """).collect()[0][0]
Gold_TotalRowCount_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename}""").collect()[0][0]
Gold_ActiveRecord_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCCurrentFlag = true """).collect()[0][0]

#Row calculation
Gold_Update = Gold_Update_Post - Gold_Update_Pre
Gold_Insert = (Gold_Insert_Post - Gold_Insert_Pre) + Gold_Update
Gold_Delete = Gold_Delete_Post - Gold_Delete_Pre
Gold_ActiveRows = Gold_ActiveRecord_Post 
Gold_TotalRows = Gold_TotalRowCount_Post

log_data = [(db_notebookname,db_tablename,Gold_LoadDate,Gold_Insert,Gold_Update,Gold_Delete,Gold_ActiveRows,Gold_TotalRows)]
print(log_data)
log_columns = ['PIPELINE_NAME', 'TABLE_NAME', 'INGEST_DATETIME', 'INSERT','UPDATE','DELETE','ACTIVE_ROWS','TOTAL_ROWS']
df_log = spark.createDataFrame(log_data, log_columns)

#Write to controldb
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)
write_table_name = "[CTL].[CFG_INGESTION_LOGS]"

try:
    df_log.write.format("jdbc") \
        .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
        .option("dbtable", write_table_name) \
        .option("accessToken", access_token) \
        .option("encrypt", "true") \
        .option("databaseName", db_name) \
        .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
        .mode("append") \
        .save()
except ValueError as error :
    print("MSSQL Connector write failed", error)

print("MSSQL Connector write(append) succeeded  ")

gold_df = spark.sql(f"""
SELECT 
    FactFuelConsumptionKey,
	DimMonthStartDateKey,
	DimSiteKey,
	DimUsageCategoryKey,
	DimEmissionScopeKey,
	DieselTransportationConsumptionVolumeLitre,
	DieselStationaryConsumptionVolumeLitre,
	PetrolTransportationConsumptionVolumeLitre,
	PetrolStationaryConsumptionVolumeLitre,
	DieselTransportationEmissionsTCO2e,
	DieselStationaryEmissionsTCO2e,
	PetrolTransportationEmissionsTCO2e,
	PetrolStationaryEmissionsTCO2e,
	CDCLoadDate,
	CDCStartDate,
	CDCEndDate,
	CDCOps,
	CDCCurrentFlag
FROM
    gold.fact_fuel_consumption
""")
#display(gold_df)

# Configure and submit the request to write to Synapse Dedicated SQL Pool
(gold_df.write
.option(Constants.SERVER, f"""{SynapseDedicatedServer}""")
.option(Constants.TEMP_FOLDER, (f"""abfss://temp@{TempFolder}/{tablename}_staging"""))
.mode("overwrite")
.synapsesql(f"""{SynapseDedicatedDatabase}.dbo.{tablename}"""))
# Table: FactFuelConsumption: END
